name: Buttercrunch Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250°F.
2. Grease a 14 x 10-inch roasting pan.
3. Pop the popcorn and put it in a very large bowl with the nuts.
4. In a saucepan, bring together brown sugar, corn syrup, and butter. Stir until the sugar is dissolved.
5. Reduce heat and cook for 5 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in butterscotch chips, vanilla, baking soda, and salt until blended and smooth.
6. Quickly pour the syrup mixture over the popcorn and nuts, stirring to coat thoroughly.
7. Pour the mixture into the prepared roasting pan.
8. Bake for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for about 15 minutes.
10. Turn the mixture out onto foil to cool completely.
11. Break the popcorn into smaller pieces and store in airtight containers in a cool, dry place up to 2 weeks.
